revision.text:
{{Left66|50|3=float:right;border:5px solid red;|M=0 0 2em 5em;|P=6em 3em 6em 3em;|BG=#FFa935;}}
'''This template ''must be'' [[Wikipedia:Template substitution|substituted]]'''.
;usage # Template for documentation pages of templates and produces the message at right. # WhatLinksHere for same acts as a pseudocategory tracking templates meeting said classifications.
;Example: See placement on {{lts|DATE/doc}} [[Category:Citation and verifiability maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[category:Template namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]]

revision.text: {{Ombox |type=notice |image=[[File:Imbox notice.png|32px|alt=|link=]] |text='''This template should always be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]''' – use {{Template other|{{tlsp|{{PAGENAME}}}}|{{tlsu|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}.{{#if:{{yesno|{{{auto|no}}}}}| Any accidental transclusions will be automatically substituted by a bot.{{{1|}}}{{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}|[[Category:Wikipedia templates to be automatically substituted]]}}}}{{#if:{{{alt|}}}| For transcluding, use {{tl|{{{alt|}}}}} instead.|}}}} <includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}|[[Category:Wikipedia substituted templates]]}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
